name: nocompact_rank64_seqlen64_exp027
hypothesis: LINEAR-READ vs COMPACTION ceiling separator. 26 prior configs ALL got recall 0.0 (incl exp017 which added a softmax read the model ignored). The GDN3 read is entirely linear-in-q (kron_q+old_q+prev_q+self all linear in q) so it can only emit a linear projection -> fits the marginal digit distribution (format, tokacc ~0.30) but structurally cannot do exact key->value retrieval (linear-capacity ceiling). But lossy SVD compaction (seq_len=512, P=16 = 32 windows) is a SECOND possible ceiling. Set residual_rank=64, seq_len=64 so P>=seq_len -> NO compaction, exact buffer for all tokens. If recall stays 0 -> linear read is definitively the ceiling (next: nonlinear/softmax read edit). If recall>0 -> compaction was the ceiling (next: attack state retention). Config-only, decisive separator.
